name: Annex IX Reporting Format for NBFCs Declaring Dividend
content:
**Annex IX Reporting Format for NBFCs Declaring Dividend**

Annex IX Reporting Format for NBFCs Declaring Dividend Details of dividend declared during the financial year Name of the NBFC - _________ Accounting period * Net profit for the accounting period (₹ crore) Rate of dividend (%) Amount of dividend (₹ crore) Dividend Pay Out Ratio (%) * quarter or half year or year ended ----- as the case may be
